frozen.family_definition: drawing_id OR SHA-256 of endpoint-order-invariant segment geometry normalized for translation, global scale, rotation, and reflection; coordinates quantized to 1/1000 max-bbox span

procedure.name: salted-family-hash balanced greedy v1
procedure.assignment: assign to lower drawing-count side; on ties use assignment-hash leading-nibble parity

frozen.row_order_contract: within each split, rows retain original val.npz order; gid maps to source_gid
